My Account

About Us

Your trusted self-storage partner in Jeffrey's Bay

Our Story

National Secure Storage — Jeffrey's Bay is part of a trusted South African self-storage network dedicated to providing secure, affordable, and flexible storage solutions for residents and businesses in the Eastern Cape.

Our facility at 35 St Croix Street offers a range of unit sizes from extra-small (6 m²) to large (27 m²), suitable for everything from a few boxes to the contents of a large home.

Security Features

Your belongings are protected at every level

24/7 CCTV Surveillance

High-definition cameras monitor all areas of our facility around the clock. Recorded footage is securely stored.

Perimeter Electric Fencing

Our facility is secured with electric fencing and controlled access gates to prevent unauthorized entry.

Secure Access Control

Only authorized tenants can access the facility during business hours. Each unit has its own lock.

Why Jeffrey's Bay?

The perfect location for your storage needs

Growing Community

Jeffrey's Bay is one of the fastest-growing coastal towns in the Eastern Cape. More residents and businesses mean more storage needs.

Coastal Lifestyle

Seasonal residents, surfers, and holidaymakers need reliable storage for their belongings between visits to JBay.

Business Hub

Local businesses need inventory and equipment storage. Our flexible terms make it easy for startups and established companies alike.

Our Location

35 St Croix Street, Jeffrey's Bay, Eastern Cape, 6330

Conveniently located in the heart of Jeffrey's Bay, we're easy to find and offer drive-up access for hassle-free loading and unloading.

NATIONAL SECURE STORAGE

Secure, affordable self-storage solutions in Jeffrey's Bay. Your space, your peace of mind. 24/7 CCTV, flexible contracts, and drive-up access.
